summary_text: Thesis: Medical AI should be adopted first where it can be audited and shared across teams, not merely where it is larger. - Auditability makes errors visible, traceable, and correctable before they scale. - Shared context reduces handoff loss and keeps clinicians aligned on why outputs were produced. - Size helps performance, but safe adoption depends more on accountability and continuity. consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
